Name: cloud-del-norte-security-headers
Comment: CSP + HSTS + related security headers for clouddelnorte.org. Managed via infra/apply-security-headers.sh

ContentSecurityPolicy.ContentSecurityPolicy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://meet.clouddelnorte.org; connect-src 'self' https://cloud-del-norte.auth.us-west-2.amazoncognito.com https://rwmypxz9z6.execute-api.us-west-2.amazonaws.com https://meet.clouddelnorte.org; frame-src https://meet.clouddelnorte.org https://cloud-del-norte.auth.us-west-2.amazoncognito.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https://www.gravatar.com; font-src 'self' data:
